description: A modal dialog with backdrop, focus trap, and ESC to close.

handled: role="dialog" and aria-modal="true" are set on the panel
aria-labelledby is wired to aihio-dialog-title when present
aria-describedby is wired to aihio-dialog-description when present
Focus is trapped within the dialog while open
Background scroll is locked while open
Focus is restored to the trigger on close

required.requirement: Provide aria-label on aihio-dialog describing the dialog's purpose; otherwise screen readers announce an unnamed dialog.
Label the confirming button with variant="destructive" and keep Cancel as the first focusable control.

counterExamples.reason: Missing header and footer. Provide aihio-dialog-title for a name and aihio-dialog-footer for actions.
Dialogs must not be nested. Close the current dialog before opening another.

examples:
<aihio-dialog>
  <aihio-dialog-header>
    <aihio-dialog-title>Are you sure?</aihio-dialog-title>
    <aihio-dialog-description>This action cannot be undone.</aihio-dialog-description>
  </aihio-dialog-header>
  <aihio-dialog-footer>
    <aihio-button variant="outline">Cancel</aihio-button>
    <aihio-button variant="destructive">Delete</aihio-button>
  </aihio-dialog-footer>
</aihio-dialog>
